fixed_skill.desc: 12.6/13.3/13.9% chance to inflict Despair on all foes for 3 turns.
fixed_skill.name: Abysmal Surge

innate_skill.desc: Deal Nuclear damage to all foes equal to 66.9/69.9/72.9% of Attack. Deal a Technical and increase damage by 20% for foes with an elemental ailment.
innate_skill.name: Mafreidyne

innate_skill.desc: Restore 6.5% of max HP and SP after winning a battle.
innate_skill.name: Life Aid IV

innate_skill.desc: Decrease 1 foe's Attack, Defense, ailment accuracy, and ailment resistance by 7.8%/8.2%/8.6%, and Speed by 5. Lasts for 3 turns.
innate_skill.name: Debilitate

showtime_skill.desc: Deal Almighty damage to all foes equal to 45.0%/48.2%/51.3% of Attack. Increase damage taken by 19.6%/21.0%/22.3% for 2 turns.
showtime_skill.name: Highlight
